p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

Drug not available - out of stock

Finding related to risk factor in pregnancy

div.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: VLSMS Provided Reasons For Cancelling/Rejecting Lab Order v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Inappropriate bottle or container for sample
DBS cards that have serum rings indicating contamination around spots
DBS card with clotting present in spots
DBS cards with insufficient blood spots
Missing information on request form - ART No
Missing information on request form - Sex
Missing labels on container or tracking form
Missing information on request form - Sample Collection Date
Missing information on request form - Age
Plasma that arrives at a temperature above 8 C
Plasma tube contain less than 1.5 mL
ETDA tube that arrives more than 24 hours after specimen collection
EDTA tube specimens that arrived hemolyzed

title.value: Lab Order Reasons For Cancelling/Rejecting Lab Order

display.value: Inappropriate bottle or container for sample
DBS cards that have serum rings indicating contamination around spots
DBS card with clotting present in spots
DBS cards with insufficient blood spots
Missing information on request form - ART No
Missing information on request form - Sex
Missing labels on container or tracking form
Missing information on request form - Sample Collection Date
Missing information on request form - Age
Plasma that arrives at a temperature above 8 C
Plasma tube contain less than 1.5 mL
ETDA tube that arrives more than 24 hours after specimen collection
EDTA tube specimens that arrived hemolyzed

p.style: border: black 1px dotted; background-color: #EEEEEE; padding: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px

li.a: VLSMS Provided Reasons For Testing v0.1.0 (CodeSystem)

tr.td: Confirmation Of Treatment Failure(repeat VL at 3M)

title.value: Reason for Assessment or Test Not Performed

display.value: Confirmation Of Treatment Failure(repeat VL at 3M)
